fields.description: Sandbox-only for now. Live is gated until the Stripe account is activated.
fields.label: Environment

fields.description: Master switch. When off, all payment-creation endpoints refuse.
fields.label: Enable Stripe Payments

fields.description: Secret key (sk_test_... in sandbox). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: Secret Key

fields.description: Signing secret from the Stripe webhook endpoint (whsec_...). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: Webhook Signing Secret

fields.description: Point your Stripe webhook endpoint here.
fields.label: Webhook URL (read-only)

fields.description: Bank/clearing GL account that Stripe funds post to. Required before going live.
fields.label: Deposit / Clearing Account

fields.description: Expense account for Stripe's processing fees, debited from each payout (e.g. Merchant Fees). Required for payout reconciliation.
fields.label: Merchant Fees Account

fields.description: Real bank GL account Stripe pays out to. The payout Journal Entry debits this account with the net amount that lands in the bank. Required for payout reconciliation.
fields.label: Payout Bank Account

fields.description: ACH (us_bank_account) settles slower; payments post on the delayed success webhook.
fields.label: Accept ACH Bank Debit

fields.description: Shown on the customer's bank/card statement (max 22 chars).
fields.label: Statement Descriptor

fields.description: Pass card/ACH processing fees to customers. OFF by default. Card surcharging is legally regulated — read docs/stripe_surcharging_compliance.md before enabling.
fields.label: Surcharge / Fee Pass-Through

fields.description: Credit-card surcharge percent. US network cap is 3% (and must be ≤ your cost of acceptance; some states cap lower or ban it). Debit cards must never be surcharged.
fields.label: Card Surcharge %

fields.description: Income account the collected surcharge/fee posts to.
fields.label: Surcharge Income Account

fields.default: A processing fee applies to card payments and is itemized below. To avoid it, go back and choose bank (ACH) payment.
fields.label: Surcharge Disclosure (shown before payment)

fields.default: By saving your card or bank account, you authorize Sapphire Fountains LLC to charge it for amounts you owe (including maintenance and service invoices) in the amount shown on each invoice, on or after that invoice's due date, on a recurring basis. Charge frequency varies with your service schedule. This authorization stays in effect until you revoke it — cancel anytime in the customer portal or by contacting us at (801) 837-2199 or info@sapphirefountains.com. For bank (ACH) debits you also authorize electronic debits from the account provided, per these terms.
fields.description: Recurring/stored-payment authorization shown before a customer saves a method for off-session charges. Should state the amount (or how determined), timing/frequency, and how to revoke (Nacha/card-network requirement).
fields.label: Autopay Consent / Authorization Text
